inputs.label: Value (x)
inputs.businessContext: The primary numeric value for which the base-10 logarithm is computed.

businessContext_i18n.en: The primary numeric value for which the base-10 logarithm is computed.
businessContext_i18n.tr: 10 tabanında logaritması hesaplanan birincil sayısal değer.
businessContext_i18n.de: Der primäre numerische Wert, für den der Logarithmus zur Basis 10 berechnet wird.
businessContext_i18n.fr: La valeur numérique principale pour laquelle le logarithme en base 10 est calculé.
businessContext_i18n.es: El valor numérico principal para el cual se calcula el logaritmo en base 10.

inputs.label: Second Value (y)
inputs.businessContext: A secondary numeric value used in product and quotient rule calculations to demonstrate logarithmic properties.

businessContext_i18n.en: A secondary numeric value used in product and quotient rule calculations to demonstrate logarithmic properties.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Logaritma özelliklerini göstermek için çarpım ve bölüm kuralı hesaplamalarında kullanılan ikincil sayısal değer.
businessContext_i18n.de: Ein sekundärer numerischer Wert, der in Produkt- und Quotientenregel-Berechnungen verwendet wird, um logarithmische Eigenschaften zu demonstrieren.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Une valeur numérique secondaire utilisée dans les calculs de règle du produit et du quotient pour démontrer les propriétés logarithmiques.
businessContext_i18n.es: Un valor numérico secundario utilizado en cálculos de regla del producto y del cociente para demostrar propiedades logarítmicas.

inputs.label: Exponent (n)
inputs.businessContext: The exponent applied to the primary value in the power rule (log10(x^n) = n·log10(x)).

businessContext_i18n.en: The exponent applied to the primary value in the power rule (log10(x^n) = n·log10(x)).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Kuvvet kuralında birincil değere uygulanan üs (log10(x^n) = n·log10(x)).
businessContext_i18n.de: Der Exponent, der auf den primären Wert in der Potenzregel angewendet wird (log10(x^n) = n·log10(x)).
businessContext_i18n.fr: L'exposant appliqué à la valeur principale dans la règle de puissance (log10(x^n) = n·log10(x)).
businessContext_i18n.es: El exponente aplicado al valor principal en la regla de la potencia (log10(x^n) = n·log10(x)).

inputs.label: Custom Base (b)
inputs.businessContext: An alternative logarithm base for change-of-base demonstration (log_b(x) = log10(x)/log10(b)).

businessContext_i18n.en: An alternative logarithm base for change-of-base demonstration (log_b(x) = log10(x)/log10(b)).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Taban değiştirme gösterimi için alternatif logaritma tabanı (log_b(x) = log10(x)/log10(b)).
businessContext_i18n.de: Eine alternative Logarithmusbasis für die Demonstration des Basiswechsels (log_b(x) = log10(x)/log10(b)).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Une base de logarithme alternative pour la démonstration du changement de base (log_b(x) = log10(x)/log10(b)).
businessContext_i18n.es: Una base de logaritmo alternativa para demostración de cambio de base (log_b(x) = log10(x)/log10(b)).

inputs.label: Decimal Places
inputs.businessContext: The number of decimal places to which all outputs are rounded for readability and engineering precision.

businessContext_i18n.en: The number of decimal places to which all outputs are rounded for readability and engineering precision.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Tüm çıktıların okunabilirlik ve mühendislik hassasiyeti için yuvarlandığı ondalık basamak sayısı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Die Anzahl der Dezimalstellen, auf die alle Ausgaben zur Lesbarkeit und technischen Genauigkeit gerundet werden.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Le nombre de décimales auxquelles toutes les sorties sont arrondies pour la lisibilité et la précision technique.
businessContext_i18n.es: El número de decimales al que se redondean todas las salidas para legibilidad y precisión técnica.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
